landing.heroDescription: Fully digitize your operational workflows from field data entry via real-time inspection apps, all the way to final executive dashboards and automated KPI reporting.
landing.feature1Desc: A strict 5-stage hierarchical approval engine ensuring total accountability from inspector to catering manager.
landing.feature2Desc: 6 dedicated dashboard environments tailored strictly to the permissions of the logged-in personnel.
landing.feature3Desc: Camera alert integrations and automated incident reporting workflows across all active branch zones.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: View and manage inspection reports
reports.rejectionNotesRequired: Notes are required when rejecting a report
reports.approvalWarning: Once approved, this report will be submitted to the company account and marked as finalized. This action may not be reversible.
reports.executiveSummaryText: This report evaluates the operational performance for the selected time slot. A total of {{total}} submissions were analyzed, resulting in an average score of {{avgScore}}%, indicating {{performance}}.
reports.exportDescription: Choose how you would like to export this report. You can download it as a PDF file or share it directly with others.
reports.exportNote: The exported report will include all metrics, analysis, and recommendations in a professional format.
reports.findingBelowThreshold: Overall performance is below acceptable threshold.
reports.findingLowPerformers: Low-performing submissions are affecting the average score.
reports.findingWeakApprovals: Approvals were granted despite weak performance.
reports.findingLimitedData: Limited data reduces reliability of evaluation.

daily_report.title: Daily Reports
daily_report.subtitle: View and manage daily operation reports
daily_report.label: Label
daily_report.exportDescription: Choose how you would like to export this report. You can download it as a PDF file, print it directly, or share it with others.
daily_report.exportNote: The exported report will include all metrics, analysis, and recommendations in a professional format.
daily_report.withAcceptedRejected: with {{accepted}} accepted and {{rejected}} rejected submissions, and {{pending}} still pending approval
daily_report.scoreStrength: Score strength is concentrated in the top band (90–100) for {{count}} submission(s), supporting strong compliance when the process completes
daily_report.noShortfall: no submission shortfall vs plan detected
daily_report.pendingNoHistory: pending submission(s) have no status history, limiting traceability of where approvals stall
daily_report.enforceCompleteness: Enforce planned reporting completeness (5 submissions per window). Prioritize windows with the largest shortfalls first
daily_report.addPreCloseCheckpoint: Add a pre-close checkpoint to prevent end-of-window submission gaps
daily_report.maintainCompleteness: Maintain completeness discipline by continuing current submission controls; monitor any future "missing vs plan" variance as an early warning for under-reporting
daily_report.reduceApprovalLatency: Reduce approval latency by prioritizing the {{count}} pending submissions for immediate branch review. Use cycle-time outliers (above median) to triage where workflow stalls
daily_report.sustainTimelyClosure: Sustain timely closure by keeping the current approval cadence; treat "pending approvals" as a zero-tolerance KPI for operational reliability
daily_report.improveCorrectiveAction: Improve corrective action quality by requiring rejection notes (currently missing on {{count}} rejected submissions). Standardize a short taxonomy (e.g., hygiene, temperature, documentation, timing) to enable trend analytics
daily_report.keepFeedbackQuality: Keep feedback quality high by ensuring every rejection includes a concise, actionable note and by periodically auditing note completeness
daily_report.liftConsistency: Lift consistency by targeting the bottom-performing submissions (lowest scores) with focused checks and follow-up audits in the next cycle; prioritize forms/windows where low scores coincide with rejection or prolonged cycle times
daily_report.noHighSeverityRisks: All available indicators show no high-severity risks (pending approvals, missing windows, or missing rejection notes).
daily_report.noScoredSubmissions: No scored submissions available to rank.
daily_report.keyTakeaway1: Overall performance classified as {{performanceClass}} with an average score of {{avgScore}} across {{scoredCount}}/{{totalSubmissions}} scored submissions.
daily_report.keyTakeaway2: Success (accepted) rate is {{successRate}} with {{acceptedCount}} accepted and {{rejectedCount}} rejected submissions.
daily_report.keyTakeaway3: Operational completeness is {{completeness}} ({{actual}}/{{expected}}) based on an expectation of {{expectedPerWindow}} submissions per window; total missing submissions: {{missing}}.
daily_report.keyTakeaway3NoWindows: No meal windows found for this slot (expected completeness cannot be assessed).
daily_report.criticalRisk1: {{count}} submissions are still pending branch approval, creating execution uncertainty and delaying closure.
daily_report.criticalRisk2: {{count}} rejected submissions have no rejection notes, limiting root-cause analysis and corrective action quality.
daily_report.criticalRisk3: {{missing}} expected submissions are missing versus plan ({{actual}}/{{expected}}), creating reporting blind spots and increasing compliance risk.
daily_report.executiveSummaryPart1: The day's meal operations for this slot produced {{totalSubmissions}} submissions across {{totalWindows}} meal time windows. Overall operational outcomes are {{performanceClass}}, driven by an average score of {{avgScore}}, a success (accepted) rate of {{successRate}}, and a completion rate of {{completionRate}}.
daily_report.executiveSummaryPart2: Planned completeness (5 submissions per window) is {{completeness}} ({{actual}}/{{expected}}), with {{missing}} missing submissions versus plan.
daily_report.executiveSummaryPart3: Additionally, {{zeroWindowCount}} time window(s) have zero submissions, indicating missed or unreported operations.
daily_report.operationalOverviewItem1: Submissions captured across {{totalWindows}} meal time windows for contract {{contractName}} (Kitchen: {{kitchenName}}, Zone: {{zoneName}}).
daily_report.operationalOverviewItem2: Expected submissions: {{expectedSubmissions}} (5 per window). Actual submissions: {{totalSubmissions}}. Missing vs plan: {{missing}} (completeness: {{completeness}}).
daily_report.operationalOverviewItem3: Incomplete operations: {{pendingCount}} pending approvals may represent delayed closure or unresolved issues.
daily_report.efficiencyItem1: Approvals pending: {{pendingCount}} (risk of delayed closure and reduced reliability).
daily_report.efficiencyItem2: Median cycle time (from submission creation to last status change): {{medianCycleTime}}.
daily_report.insightItem1: **How successful was the operation?** It was {{performanceClass}}, with {{acceptedCount}} accepted and {{rejectedCount}} rejected submissions, and {{pendingCount}} still pending approval.
daily_report.insightItem2: **What worked well?** Score strength is concentrated in the top band (90–100) for {{topScoreCount}} submission(s), supporting strong compliance when the process completes.
daily_report.weaknessNoShortfall: no submission shortfall vs plan detected
daily_report.insightItem4: Operational blind spot: {{count}} pending submission(s) have no status history, limiting traceability of where approvals stall.
daily_report.recommendation1WithMissing: Enforce planned reporting completeness (5 submissions per window). Prioritize windows with the largest shortfalls first: {{shortfalls}}. Add a pre-close checkpoint to prevent end-of-window submission gaps.
daily_report.recommendation1NoMissing: Maintain completeness discipline by continuing current submission controls; monitor any future "missing vs plan" variance as an early warning for under-reporting.
daily_report.recommendation2WithPending: Reduce approval latency by prioritizing the {{pendingCount}} pending submissions for immediate branch review. Use cycle-time outliers (above median) to triage where workflow stalls.
daily_report.recommendation2NoPending: Sustain timely closure by keeping the current approval cadence; treat "pending approvals" as a zero-tolerance KPI for operational reliability.
daily_report.recommendation3WithoutNotes: Improve corrective action quality by requiring rejection notes (currently missing on {{count}} rejected submissions). Standardize a short taxonomy (e.g., hygiene, temperature, documentation, timing) to enable trend analytics.
daily_report.recommendation3WithNotes: Keep feedback quality high by ensuring every rejection includes a concise, actionable note and by periodically auditing note completeness.
daily_report.recommendation4: Lift consistency by targeting the bottom-performing submissions (lowest scores) with focused checks and follow-up audits in the next cycle; prioritize forms/windows where low scores coincide with rejection or prolonged cycle times.
